title.rendered: What is Content Marketing’s True Essence?

content.rendered: In a recent discussion, Fractional CMO Ian Feder and David Reske, CEO of Nowspeed, delved into content marketing’s true essence, challenging the myth that it’s solely about information delivery. Ian stressed the vital role of emotions in decision-making, highlighting differences between B2B and B2C dynamics. Feder emphasized a customer-centric approach, involving in-depth research, clear CTAs, and understanding the customer’s journey. He also advocated for recognizing media consumption habits to tailor campaigns effectively. Feder’s insights advocate for a holistic, emotionally-informed, and adaptive content marketing approach, underscoring the importance of continuous evolution based on comprehensive data. Listen to it in more detail now!
